message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
left to right direction
skinparam packageStyle rectangle

actor "Project Manager" as PM
participant ":ProjectManagerUI" as UI
participant "AGVServer" as AGVS
participant "AGVServerThread" as AGVST
participant "AVGManagerController" as AMC
participant "AGVDigitalTwinServer" as DTWS
participant "AGVDigitalTwinThread" as DTWT
participant "AGVDigitalTwinController" as DTWC
participant "CodingAndDecoding2" as CAD

PM -> UI : Wants to assign ready to go Orders to an AGV
activate UI
UI -> AGVS : message
activate AGVS
AGVS -> AGVS : accept
AGVS -> AGVST : start
activate AGVST
AGVST -> CAD : Decoding(r)
activate CAD
CAD --> AGVST : Message
deactivate CAD
AGVST -> AMC : FifoAGV()
activate AMC
AMC -> AMC : findavailableOrder()
loop until orderList is empty
    AMC -> AMC : findavailableAGV(weight,volume)
    AMC -> AMC : createTaskandSave(description,order,agv)
    AMC -> AMC : doTask()
    AMC -> DTWS : message
    activate DTWS
    DTWS -> DTWS : accept
    DTWS -> DTWT : start
    activate DTWT
    DTWT -> CAD : Decoding(r)
    activate CAD
    CAD --> DTWT : message
    deactive CAD
    DTWT -> DTWC : doTask(taskPerform)
    activate DTWC
    DTWC --> DTWT : TaskReportMessage
    deactivate DTWC
    DTWT --> DTWS : TaskReportMessage
    deactivate DTWT
    DTWS --> AMC : TaskReportMessage
    deactivate DTWS
end
AMC --> AGVST : ResponseMessage
deactivate AMC
AGVST --> AGVS : ResponseMessage
deactivate AGVST
AGVS --> UI : ResponseMessage
deactivate AGVS
UI --> PM : Informs operation success
deactivate UI

@enduml
```
